passing_score_scale: Scaled score 0–1000; 600 (60%) passing for HCIA and HCIP written exams

testing_centers.notes: All Huawei ICT written exams are delivered through Pearson VUE. Online proctored (OnVUE) and test center options both available. HCIE lab exams are conducted at designated Huawei Authorized Lab centers and must be scheduled separately through the Huawei Talent portal.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted during the written exam. HCIE lab exams test hands-on configuration skills on real Huawei equipment. Lab exam duration and format varies by track; candidates must pass both written and lab components to earn HCIE certification.
renewal_options: Certifications are valid for 3 years. Recertification requires passing the current version of the same exam or a higher-level exam in the same track within the validity period. Alternatively, candidates may accumulate Huawei continuing education credits.

prerequisites.description: HCIP-Cloud Computing recommended; significant hands-on experience required

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between failed written exam attempts. HCIE lab retakes may have additional scheduling constraints. Full exam fee applies for each retake attempt.

official_study_resources.title: Huawei ICT Certification Exam Preparation
official_study_resources.notes: Official exam blueprints, courseware references, and preparation guides on the Huawei Talent portal.

official_study_resources.title: Huawei ICT Academy / Authorized Training Partners
official_study_resources.notes: Instructor-led and online courses through Huawei ICT Academy partners worldwide.
